title: rhododendron × peregrinum
intro: Rhododendron × peregrinum, a hybrid plant species, is a cross between the native Asian rhododendrons and the European rhododendrons, known for its vibrant flowers and attractive foliage. Rhododendron × peregrinum has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron × peregrinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Rhododendron × peregrinum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
